title: Add Giga tab to terminal page

log.context: Add Giga tab to terminal page

Both services are running. Here's a summary of what was built:

---

**What was built:**

**New service: `giga-terminal.service`**
- Runs `ttyd --port 7683 --interface 127.0.0.1 sudo -u gigaclungus screen -x gigaclungus`
- ttyd is read-only by default (no `-W` flag), so visitors can watch but not type
- Bound to loopback only — not publicly accessible directly

**New routes in `server.py`:**
- `GET /giga` — serves an xterm.js terminal page that connects to `/giga-ws`
- `GET /giga-ws` — WebSocket...(truncated)
